title: Sea Team Square Jute Storage Basket with Internal Frame Support - Structured Organizer 42x30x25cm for Shelves, Cabinets, Home Decor
features: Spacious & Functional Dimensions: 42x30x25cm open-top design effortlessly stores blankets, toys, magazines, or laundry while allowing quick access. Square shape maximizes corner space utilization.
Space-Optimized Rigid Corners: Reinforced edges and vertical frame create defined square shape, ideal for tight spaces like bookshelves or under desks. Holds items upright without slouching.

Versatile Multi-Scene Use: Perfect for living rooms as a coffee table organizer, in bedrooms for linens, as a nursery toy bin, or even office document storage. Textured surface resists dust accumulation.

Premium Leather Handles with Frame Lock: Dual genuine leather straps riveted to internal frame provide weight-bearing support. Ergonomic grip distributes pressure evenly for comfortable 15kg+ carrying.
Reinforced Base & Portability: Thickened bottom panel prevents sagging. Lightweight yet stable for carrying between rooms. Wipe clean with damp cloth; avoid prolonged water exposure.
